setup: Create a schema-constrained workflow with one idempotent tool node.
Persist the workflow output and external artifact references after the tool commit.
action: Terminate the worker after the committed checkpoint is visible.
Create a replacement process and resume with the same workflow identity and checkpoint.
reproduction.expected: The replacement process restores the checkpoint without invoking the completed tool.
reproduction.observed: Fred provides orchestration checkpoints, while product event ordering, artifact restoration, and idempotent tool suppression require a product-local adapter.
